$comment: Negative fixture for PRD-101. The manifest declares delivery: "runtime" but is being served via the static well-known path with no Link-header runtime hand-off and no authenticated context. Per PRD-101-R12, the declared `delivery` MUST match the discovery context. A runtime-declared manifest reached purely as a static file with no runtime signal is a conformance error.

expected.notes: Manifest declares delivery=runtime but was reached via static well-known path with no Link header advertising runtime profile. Validators MUST emit a discovery-mismatch finding.
